class.name: FestivalPlotHook
class.brief_description: A quest or narrative thread linking NPCs, places, items and events.
class.description: Plot hooks are the hub entity of an imported Secret Census world: one hook ties NPCs, locations, items, rumors, events, outfits and even specific NPC secrets together into a single storyline. Each entry of [member linked_npc_secrets] is a [Dictionary] with camelCase keys [code]npcId[/code] and [code]secretType[/code] ([code]"secret"[/code] or [code]"darkSecret"[/code]) — part of the import contract in [code]SECRET_CENSUS_COMPATIBILITY.md[/code].

members.member: The raw Secret Census source record, kept so no exported detail is lost.
Unique identifier used by the registry and by [code]linked_plot_hook_ids[/code] references on other resources.
If [code]true[/code], the plot hook is part of the main progression path.
Ids of [FestivalEvent] resources belonging to this storyline.
Ids of [FestivalItem] resources involved in this storyline.
Ids of [FestivalLocation] resources involved in this storyline.
Ids of NPCs involved in this storyline.
Array of [Dictionary] entries [code]{ "npcId": String, "secretType": "secret"|"darkSecret" }[/code] pointing at specific NPC secrets this storyline hinges on.
Ids of [FestivalOutfit] resources relevant to this storyline.
Ids of rumor [FestivalKnowledge] entries feeding this storyline.
